covered_report_window: Tuesday, July 21, 2026 after U.S. market close plus Wednesday, July 22, 2026 before U.S. market open.
market_context_summary: U.S. market was open during the run; the strict actionable window is July 21 AMC plus July 22 BMO. Macro context includes a heavy Q2 earnings week, light economic data, ongoing oil/geopolitical pressure, and an AI/power-infrastructure narrative that affects crowding in GEV and related names.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Backlog, gas-power slot reservations, and margin expansion support upside, but the stock already embeds a powerful AI-electricity narrative.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Investors are watching orders, backlog conversion, gas-power reservations, Electrification growth, and EBITDA margin quality.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: A clean orders/backlog update and stronger EBITDA margin could validate the AI power-infrastructure thesis.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: A merely good quarter could fade if order growth slows, margin quality is weaker, or guidance is not raised enough.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Options data unavailable in verified public sources; narrative crowding and large share-price appreciation raise reversal risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Street previews emphasize strong backlog and AI-related power demand.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Peer trading strength, client activity, and margin loan growth point to upside if IBKR confirms the brokerage activity boom.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Consensus looks for strong EPS and revenue growth; focus is DARTs, client accounts, margin loans, and net interest income.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Strong DARTs, account growth, and net interest income could produce a clean beat.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: The stock has rallied sharply, so anything short of broad-based activity strength could be sold.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Public options-implied move not verified; YTD momentum creates event-volatility unwind risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: IBD preview cited expected 25.5% EPS growth and 21.5% revenue growth.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Smoke-free momentum and pricing support upside, but the stock’s recent run leaves little room for merely in-line strength.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Market focus is smoke-free volume, ZYN/IQOS growth, organic revenue, currency-adjusted EPS, and updated guidance.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: A smoke-free beat with raised full-year confidence could extend the rerating.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: A small miss in U.S. oral nicotine, HTU volumes, or guidance could trigger a sell-the-news move.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Bloomberg-compiled options data cited a 4.9% implied move into the July 22 report.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Previews expect top- and bottom-line growth, with Q2 EPS around $2.02 and revenue around $10.6B in public calendar sources.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Net investment income and underwriting discipline give Chubb a cleaner upside skew than most financials in the window.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Focus is combined ratio, catastrophe losses, reserves, and adjusted net investment income.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Stronger investment income and disciplined underwriting can drive a beat.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Catastrophe or reserve surprises would quickly overpower a decent EPS result.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Options data not verified; lower narrative crowding keeps reversal risk below most top setups.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Zacks preview cited management’s Q2 adjusted net investment income expectation of $1.825B-$1.85B.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Record activity in rates and strong operating leverage create a relatively low-reversal upside setup.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Market focus is ADV by product, rate and equity-index volume, fees per contract, and operating leverage.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Sustained rate volatility and strong transaction fees can support a beat.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: If June activity softened or fee mix deteriorated, the earnings quality could disappoint.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Options data unavailable; defensive exchange model reduces reversal risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: MarketBeat preview cited EPS expectations near $2.98 and revenue near $1.71B.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Backlog expansion and margin execution lean positive, though the score is below allocation threshold.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Focus is backlog, freight/transit growth, margins, and any full-year EPS update.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Another backlog and margin beat could support upside.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Industrial-cycle caution or unchanged guidance could limit reaction.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Options data unavailable; moderate reversal risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Q1 release showed 13% sales growth and raised FY EPS guidance.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Strong issuance and analytics momentum lean positive, but expectations already reflect a strong Q1 backdrop.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Focus is MIS issuance revenue, MA ARR, margins, and AI/data demand.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: High-grade issuance and analytics ARR strength can sustain the beat pattern.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Leveraged finance softness or in-line guidance could cap upside.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Options data unavailable; moderate reversal risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Q1 was a record quarter with strong MIS revenue and MA ARR growth.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Execution and natural-gas pricing support upside, but commodity volatility and pass disagreement limit conviction.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Focus is production, capex, realized pricing, free cash flow, and 2026 guidance.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Higher production and lower capex could improve cash-flow expectations.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Weak realized price or cautious gas commentary could reverse the setup.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Options data unavailable; commodity beta raises reversal risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Public preview cited Q2 EPS around $0.43 on revenue around $1.87B.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Wireless and fiber metrics look steady, but Starlink speculation and FCF scrutiny keep the setup near neutral.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Focus is postpaid phone adds, broadband/fiber adds, free cash flow, and any Starlink/mobile disruption commentary.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Postpaid and fiber adds plus FCF recovery could relieve the stock.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Weak broadband or sharper Starlink competitive commentary could pressure shares.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Options data unavailable; defensive valuation reduces reversal risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: IBD preview cited expected EPS of $0.59 and revenue of $31.82B.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Deposit and NIM recovery lean positive, but credit sensitivity keeps the consensus at neutral.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Focus is deposits, NIM, loan growth, CRE credit, and tangible book value.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Deposit growth and stable credit could extend regional-bank relief.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: CRE or reserve concerns could overwhelm a headline beat.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Options data unavailable; regional-bank beta creates moderate reversal risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Q1 showed net revenue growth and EPS support in IR materials.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Discover integration costs and credit-quality scrutiny create a downside skew despite already weak share performance.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Focus is net charge-offs, reserves, marketing expense, Discover integration cost, and consumer credit tone.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Improving NCOs or cleaner Discover integration costs could spark relief.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Higher reserves or expense drag could confirm consumer-credit risk.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Options data unavailable; stock weakness raises relief-rally reversal risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Barron's/FactSet preview cited adjusted EPS around $4.67 and revenue around $15.77B.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Commodity sensitivity and wide estimates produce a mild downside call with high reversal risk.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Focus is gas/NGL realizations, production, capex, and cash-return commentary.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Better NGL pricing or capital returns could reverse the downside setup.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Realization or production softness could disappoint.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Options data unavailable; commodity beta raises reversal risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Public preview cited EPS around $0.68 and revenue around $744M.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: The setup leans down because a premium AI/software narrative needs clean ACV and guide quality, but high reversal risk keeps conviction low.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Focus is Pega Cloud ACV, total ACV, free cash flow, AI/BP adoption, and guidance tone.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: A clean ACV acceleration or strong AI demand commentary could squeeze the stock higher.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Any deceleration in ACV or cautious guide could trigger a premium-growth fade.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Options data unavailable; premium software and AI narrative raise reversal risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Q1 showed Pega Cloud ACV up 29% and total ACV up 12%, raising the forward bar.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Mortgage-rate and incentive pressure make orders and gross margin the likely negative swing factors.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Focus is new orders, cancellations, incentives, community count, and home-sale gross margin.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: If Q2 is confirmed as the margin trough and orders hold, the stock could rally.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Worse incentives or orders would reinforce housing softness.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Options data unavailable; de-risked housing expectations raise relief risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Public preview cited management guidance for Q2 home-sale gross margin of 24.1%-24.4%.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Lower egg-price expectations create downside risk, but mix diversification and low expectations keep reversal risk high.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Focus is shell egg pricing, specialty egg mix, prepared-foods contribution, and margin durability.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Specialty/prepared-foods mix could offset weaker commodity egg prices.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: A sharper commodity price fall or margin compression could disappoint.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Options data unavailable; high commodity volatility creates high reversal risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Public earnings pages showed Q4 FY2026 revenue estimates around $564M-$606M, down from stronger prior quarters.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Fuel volatility and suspended guidance make the base setup negative, but airline relief risk is very high.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Focus is Q2 fuel cost, Alaska-Hawaiian integration, demand, capacity, and whether full-year guidance is restored.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: A less-bad fuel outlook or restored guidance could squeeze shares higher.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Persistent fuel pressure or weak demand commentary could drive a negative reaction.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Options data unavailable; low expectations and fuel volatility create high reversal risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Kiplinger calendar showed a negative EPS estimate; Q1 commentary cited elevated fuel costs and suspended 2026 guidance.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Credit and NII concerns are real but not distinct enough for a strong edge.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Focus is NII, deposits, commercial credit, and expenses.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Stable deposits and credit could support relief.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Credit or NIM pressure could pull shares lower.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Options data unavailable; regional-bank beta adds reversal risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Kiplinger listed EPS estimate of $1.64 for the July 21 AMC report.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: CRE sensitivity leans down, but relief risk and insufficient differentiated evidence keep it neutral.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Focus is CRE credit, NIM, deposits, and reserve commentary.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Benign credit and stable deposits could reverse the bearish setup.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: CRE reserve build or funding pressure could disappoint.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Options data unavailable; regional-bank relief risk is moderate-high.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Kiplinger listed EPS estimate of $1.48 for the July 21 AMC report.

qualified_names.why: Consensus score above 30, reversal risk at the 40 cutoff, low disparity, high evidence quality, and a clear activity metric.
Score above 30, reversal risk below 40, low disparity, and a clean NII/combined-ratio driver.
Score above 30, lowest reversal risk and lowest disparity among qualifying names, with a clear ADV/rate-volume driver.

excluded_high_reversal_or_weak_names.reason: Direction strong but reversal risk 58 from valuation and AI-power crowding.
Direction positive but reversal risk 55 after a strong stock run and high smoke-free expectations.
Score near threshold but reversal risk 46 and higher disparity.
Downside score strong but reversal risk 53 from low-bar consumer-credit relief.
Downside score strong but reversal risk 49 from low-bar housing relief.
Downside score strong but reversal risk 57 and high commodity/mix uncertainty.
Strongest downside score but reversal risk 66 from less-bad fuel and guidance relief.

research_allocation_view.plain_statement: This is a research prioritization model, not financial advice.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: All three passes leaned up, but all penalized valuation/crowding.
detailed_company_sections.method_update_note: Applied priced-in premium-growth / AI-infrastructure caution from repeated lessons.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: All three passes leaned up around client activity and margin loans.
detailed_company_sections.allocation_view_rationale: Qualified for 40% of the research basket.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: All passes leaned up on smoke-free growth but raised sell-the-news risk.
All passes leaned up with low disagreement.
detailed_company_sections.allocation_view_rationale: Qualified for 32% of the research basket.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: All passes leaned up with the lowest disparity among strong names.
detailed_company_sections.allocation_view_rationale: Qualified for 28% of the research basket.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: All passes leaned down on credit and Discover integration, but relief risk was high.
All passes saw premium-software downside risk, but reversal risk was too high for conviction.
detailed_company_sections.allocation_view_rationale: Excluded because score was below threshold and reversal risk was high.
detailed_company_sections.method_update_note: Premium-growth bearish neutralization caution applied; score remained only mild Lean Down.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: All passes leaned down on margin/orders, while noting low-bar housing relief.
All passes leaned down, but disagreement was higher because mix diversification could offset egg-price weakness.
detailed_company_sections.allocation_view_rationale: Excluded because reversal risk exceeded 40 and disparity was elevated.
detailed_company_sections.method_update_note: Key-metric-first rule emphasized commodity egg pricing versus specialty mix.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: All passes leaned down, but all flagged very high opposite-direction risk.
detailed_company_sections.allocation_view_rationale: Excluded because reversal risk was high despite the strongest negative score.

disclaimer_text: This is research, not financial advice. Earnings reactions are highly uncertain and can be driven by market positioning, guidance, macro conditions, and management commentary rather than reported results alone.
